strategyResults.details: tests/graph/mcp-client.test.ts 20/20 incl 4 real-binary integration; full suite 219 files / 2809 tests pass

criteriaSummary: All 8 required criteria pass: initialize handshake resolves only on correlated id; notifications/initialized after; tools/call envelope; unwrapMcpContent picks JSON entry even when content[0] is a WARNING; isError + JSON-RPC error -> GRAPH_ERROR; HANDSHAKE_TIMEOUT_MS=5000; real tokensave_status round-trip returns parsed object; diff confined to mcp-client.ts + its test.
summary: PASS. MCP transport correctly implemented and independently verified against the real tokensave 6.1.1 binary; zero regressions across 2809 tests.
